calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust And Questions Of Construction Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Petitioners Brian Boyd, Kerry Boyd and Daniel Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey had nothing to add. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust and Questions Of Construction of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Barrientos. Not reported.
